overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed video game showing a character in cowboy attire walking along a forest trail and rocky cliff edge to reach a waterfall overlook. The scene features dramatic overcast skies and transitions from wooded hillside to a dramatic canyon vista with a flowing river and waterfall.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the forested hillside toward the cliff edge

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest with patches of grass and fallen leaves
tall evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the path
large rocky outcrop visible in the distance to the right
wide valley visible through the trees under dark storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through a forested hillside with pine trees flanking the path. The trail leads toward a rocky cliff edge overlooking a distant valley under dramatic overcast skies.

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt path to rocky ledge as character approaches cliff edge
waterfall becomes visible in the distance below the cliff to the right

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the narrow rocky ledge with the river canyon visible to the right

entered.detail: narrow rocky trail along the cliff edge with loose stones and patches of grass
deep canyon with flowing river visible below the cliff edge
waterfall cascading down the rocks into the river, initially visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the forest path onto a narrow rocky ledge high above a river canyon. The terrain becomes more rugged and exposed as the waterfall comes into view in the distance below.

events.description: character slows and stops at the cliff edge to overlook the waterfall

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfall overlook and coming to a stop at the cliff edge to view the cascading water below

entered.detail: white mist rising from the base of the waterfall where it hits the river

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the final stretch of the cliff edge as the waterfall grows larger in view, then stops at the precipice overlooking the cascading water and mist rising from the river below.

agents.ego_description: standing still at the cliff edge looking down at the waterfall and river canyon below

segments.scene_description: The character remains stationary at the cliff edge, observing the waterfall and the river flowing through the deep canyon. The camera slightly pans to take in the dramatic view of the cascading water and rocky gorge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered forest trail that gradually opens into a dramatic, high-altitude canyon vista. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path flanked by pine trees on a forested hillside under overcast skies. As the trail reaches the cliff's edge, the scene shifts to a narrow, rugged rocky ledge where the terrain becomes exposed and a distant waterfall emerges in the valley below. The camera continues along the final stretch of the precipice as the cascading water grows larger and the mist from the river rises to meet the ledge. Finally, the character comes to a stop at the overlook, where the camera pans slightly to capture the full scale of the waterfall and the deep rocky gorge.
